title: Human Fracture Analysis Diagnostic Cards Light

cards.title: Refusal to Accept the Other's Freedom
cards.situation: One party cannot absorb the separation and tries to negotiate against freedom itself.
cards.why_flagged: Flag triggered when grief transitions into structural captivity logic.

cards.title: Bitterness as Identity
cards.situation: A person starts to organize identity around having been wronged.
higher_response: retain truthful grief without revenge identity
cards.why_flagged: Flag triggered when suffering hardens into a long-term structural toxin.

cards.title: Children Turned Into Leverage
cards.situation: Children are used as messengers, proof, allies, shields, or compensation.
cards.why_flagged: This is one of the strongest structural breach patterns in family rupture.

cards.title: Temporary Parental Eclipse
cards.situation: Shock narrows consciousness so much that children disappear from planning.
cards.why_flagged: Not every eclipse is malice, but the system flags prolonged drift away from child continuity.

cards.title: Self-Erasure Through Guilt
cards.situation: A person begins taking responsibility but slides into worthlessness or death-thought logic.
higher_response: reject the lie that fault removes human worth
cards.why_flagged: The system must distinguish structural accountability from psychic self-destruction.

cards.title: Logistics as Punishment
cards.situation: Money, paperwork, housing, or schedules become delivery channels for revenge.
cards.why_flagged: Structural diagnostics enter here: systems can hide cruelty inside practical process.

cards.title: Questions That Degrade
cards.situation: A person demands answers that would not heal anything but would serve injury, ego, or control.
cards.why_flagged: Not every unanswered question reflects a structural deficit.

cards.title: Speech That Destroys Personhood
cards.situation: Language about the other becomes insulting, objectifying, or publicly degrading.
cards.why_flagged: Language is treated as structural conduct, not neutral discharge.

cards.title: Residual Goodwill as Protective Factor
cards.situation: Practical care and easing of burden continue despite the end of romantic love.
cards.why_flagged: This is a positive signal showing reduced secondary damage.

cards.title: Narrative Absolutism
cards.situation: The story is told in a way that removes complexity, self-implication, or structural reality.
higher_response: examine own contribution and material conditions
cards.why_flagged: The system should resist simplistic moral accounting.

cards.title: Recognition of Continued Belonging
cards.situation: A person begins to understand that the family bond changes form rather than disappearing entirely.
cards.why_flagged: This is a protective continuity marker.

cards.title: Acute Collapse Requires Non-Moralizing Containment
cards.situation: The person shows panic, functional breakdown, or desire not to continue.
higher_response: suspend harsh moralization during acute collapse
cards.why_flagged: The system must detect when containment is structurally prior to interpretation.
